data.require_user_pin: Require entering a user PIN to arm/disarm

data_description.additional_user_codes: Enter extra HKC PINs as a masked comma- or newline-separated list. They are only used for multi-user access and block-aware views.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the HKC Alarm.
error.cannot_replace_and_clear_user_codes: Choose either replacement PINs or clear the stored additional PINs, not both.
error.invalid_user_codes: User PINs must contain digits only.

abort.already_configured: HKC Alarm integration is already configured.

data.require_user_pin: Require entering a user PIN to arm/disarm

data_description.configured_additional_user_codes: Read-only summary of the extra HKC PINs currently stored for this integration.
data_description.replace_additional_user_codes: Leave empty to keep the current extra PINs. Enter a masked comma- or newline-separated list here to replace the stored list.
data_description.clear_additional_user_codes: Remove all stored extra HKC PINs. Do not enable this when also entering replacement PINs.

code_required.message: Enter a configured HKC user PIN to control the alarm.

invalid_user_code.message: The entered HKC user PIN is not configured for this integration.

multi_user_not_supported.message: The installed pyhkc version does not support selecting different HKC user PINs per command.

block_commands_not_supported.message: The installed pyhkc version does not support separate alarm areas for this configuration.
